description: This file contains utility functions for string manipulation, markdown processing, and generating slugs, used within a documentation or site generation project.

methods.name: capitalizeFirstLetter
methods.description: Capitalizes the first letter of a given string.

methods.name: getSequence
methods.description: Generates an array of numbers from start to end with an optional step.

methods.name: getSlug
methods.description: Generates a URL-friendly slug from a string, replacing multiple hyphens with a single hyphen.

methods.name: trimLeadingAndTrailingSlashes
methods.description: Removes leading and trailing slashes from a string.

methods.name: stripMarkdown
methods.description: Converts markdown content to plain text.

methods.name: processMarkdownToHtml
methods.description: Converts markdown content to HTML using remark.
